{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 1.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Summary
During device acquisition, `getPathToLocalCopy()` constructs local filesystem paths for downloaded APKs using a filename component extracted by `extractFileName()`. The extraction splits on `==/` and takes the remainder without sanitization. If a compromised device returns a crafted APK path containing traversal sequences, `filepath.Join` resolves them, allowing the file to be written outside the intended `apks/` directory.

Practical exploitability is limited because Android enforces strict package path formats under `/data/app/` and does not allow apps to register paths containing traversal sequences. Rated Informational as a defense-in-depth concern.

### Impact
An attacker with control of the connected device could potentially write files outside the expected output directory on the acquisition workstation, leading to arbitrary file overwrite with attacker-controlled content.

### Patched version
[1.8.3](https://github.com/mvt-project/androidqf/releases/tag/v1.8.3)

### Credits
- This issue was identified during a security assessment conducted by 0xche. 
- An additional vulnerability was independently identified by @0x0v1", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-763j-3p5v-jfc6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T17:11:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-763j-3p5v-jfc6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-763j-3p5v-jfc6"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T17:11:47Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mvt-project/androidqf/security/advisories/GHSA-763j-3p5v-jfc6", "https://github.com/mvt-project/androidqf/releases/tag/v1.8.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-763j-3p5v-jfc6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mvt-project/androidqf/security-advisories/GHSA-763j-3p5v-jfc6", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mvt-project/androidqf", "summary": "androidqf: APK download Path Traversal in device APK paths", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T17:12:06Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-763j-3p5v-jfc6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.8.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/mvt-project/androidqf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.8.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: androidqf: APK download Path Traversal in device APK paths
